issues.sample: Rear upper control arm cracked.   Very critical safety part.  I have had a discussion with other owners and have discovered that several others have had the same issue.   Very low milage.    10k miles.  Could result in a fatal collision!  Found issue during safety inspection.   B

narrative.headline: What 2018 Lotus Evora owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Suspension (100% of reports).
